audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds: effective balance updates are committed to validator records (line 1261) during the single-pass loop (L324-346), then process_pending_consolidations runs (L443-454), and only after all balance updates complete does process_proposer_lookahead execute (L468-469). The proposer selection at line 489 calls get_beacon_proposer_indices which reads from updated validator.effective_balance fields (beacon_state.rs:1784).
